<!-- protect data -->

        <script>
          (function () {
              (function a() {
                  try {
                      (function b(i) {
                          if (('' + (i / i)).length !== 1 || i % 20 === 0) {
                              (function () { }).constructor('debugger')()
                          } else {
                              debugger
                          }
                          b(++i)
                      }
                      )(0)
                  } catch (e) {
                      setTimeout(a, 5000)
                  }
              }
              )()
          }
          )();
  </script>


        <script type="text/javascript">
          window.oncontextmenu = function () {
              return false;
          }
          $(document).keydown(function (event) {
              if (event.keyCode == 123) {
                  return false;
              }
              else if ((event.ctrlKey && event.shiftKey && event.keyCode == 73) || (event.ctrlKey && event.shiftKey && event.keyCode == 74 || event.ctrlKey &&
                  event.keyCode === 85)) {
                  return false;
              }
          });
      </script>
